results.name: gatewatch
results.description: Current or former member of the Gatewatch. They'll keep watch.

results.name: gear
results.description: A wheel with teeth, to transfer rotation between it and other gears meshed with it.  ⚙

results.name: geistmage
results.description: Mages on Innistrad who harness Geists for their magic

results.name: gem of becoming
results.description: The magical gem held between Nicol Bolas's horns. Not to be confused with Ugin's spirit gem.

results.name: genesis effect
results.description: Effects that put creatures onto the battlefield from near the top of your library.

results.name: ghirapur grand prix
results.description: A high-profile sporting event consisting of a no-holds-barred race across three planes (and a variety of smaller sideshow races).

results.name: ghitu
results.description: A nomadic tribe of Dominaria, native to Shiv.

results.name: ghost council
results.description: Characters of the Ghost Council of Orzhova.

results.name: ghostfire
results.description: An invisible fire associated with Ugin and Tarkir.

results.name: ghost-spider
results.description: Spider-themed superhero alter ego of Gwen Stacy from Earth-65.

results.name: giant growth
results.description: Combat tricks that give a creature +N/+N. See also [Enlarge](enlarge).

results.name: gifts ungiven
results.description: Get X cards from a location, opponent picks an amount of those you get to keep.
